pages.text: The $(l)Manasteel Wizard Armor$() combines the protective properties of Manasteel with the arcane enhancements of wizard robes.$(br2)Each piece provides significant spell power and mana bonuses.

pages.title: Set Bonus
pages.text: $(l)Per Piece:$()$(br)• +15% All Spell Power$(br)• +150 Max Mana$(br2)$(l)Full Set (4 pieces):$()$(br)• $(l)Mana Shield:$() Absorbs 50% of incoming damage by consuming Botania mana$(br)• Cost: 10,000 Botania mana per heart absorbed$(br2)$(o)Keep your Mana Tablets charged!$()
